articles.title: What Americans sacrifice due to high health costs - Axios
articles.description: Health cost concerns not only made people borrow money or stretch out prescriptions but delay major life events.
articles.content:
• As groceries, housing and utilities also become more costly, those pressures are forcing difficult tradeoffs in nearly every aspect of life even for those who have insurance.
